Golden Ticket Event - Final Week

The final week of the Golden Ticket Event includes $185,000 in Star Atlas loot, all chosen by the community!  

Who's going to add a Rainbow Arc, Ogrika Sunpaa, or Armstrong IMP to their fleet? 

Submit your Golden Tickets by
